text:
On Mon, 27 Sep 2010 16:30:17 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of games/daimonin-client,

> Please note that PR ports/151003 has just been submitted.

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/151003

Approved, thanks.
	-jr
